module_purpose: 把角色、上下文、派工與收尾收斂為一個深治理模組；角色名稱是能力 preset，不是各自維護的 persona。

interfaces.context: compile_context(role, task_facts) -> locally recaptured Registry-selected/derived bytes + immutable task/budget authority; self-hash alone is never provenance
interfaces.dispatch: route_task(task_facts) -> hybrid_execution_dag_v1 + digest + deterministic required nodes + finite-default task execution policy
interfaces.task_execution: persist prompt-bound contract/control/preceding snapshot behind a task-admission fencing token + recapture task-owned source bytes + exclusive linked-worktree writer lease -> deterministic continuation or terminal no-delta closure
interfaces.external_evidence: validate_external_evidence_capture(external_evidence_capture_v1, host verifier) -> typed public-policy/outcome capture; absent out-of-band verifier remains evidence debt
interfaces.closure: validate_closure(packet with admitted_role_nodes, trusted-host verifier capability) + project_closure(packet) -> validated closure view; PASS delegated/runtime/outcome/effect/context evidence requires exact out-of-band host attestation
interfaces.closure_quality_followup: build_scheduled_closure_quality_followup() + validate_closure_quality_followup() + summarize_closure_quality_followups() -> closure-digest-bound durability ledger; measured values require caller-trusted PLATFORM_OR_EXTERNAL_ATTESTED evidence

16-root-principles-checklist.activation: hard-boundary, authority, live/risk, or constitutional decision only; never preload

architecture-depth-review.activation: cross-module or cross-runtime architecture, trust-boundary, or high-risk interface change only

ultracode-full-audit.activation: explicit full/cold audit; never universal preload

authority_classes.normative_policy: Root Principles、Hard Boundaries、accepted ADR/AMD、明確 operator decision
authority_classes.runtime_observation: 帶 host/environment/observed_at/expiry 的 process、config、PG、artifact 觀測
authority_classes.external_policy: 已實際開啟的公開官方 URL，帶 content digest、citation/capture provenance 與 verified_at 的 broker/供應商規則

source_writer.write_scope: task-owned source and focused tests only

test_writer.write_scope: tests, fixtures, and test-only helpers; never business implementation

design_writer.write_scope: architecture/spec/ADR documents explicitly owned by the task

docs_writer.write_scope: task-owned docs, comments, indexes, and deterministic report projections

orchestrator.write_scope: plans, governance, task integration, and operator-approved adapter intents

broker_bybit.source: official Bybit source when freshness matters

broker_ibkr.source: official IBKR source when freshness matters

gui_visual.source: screenshots or browser trace when available

capability_packs.orchestration: 把目標轉成最小充分 DAG，整合 dissent、成本、證據與最終裁決
capability_packs.functional_acceptance: 把 operator 目標轉成 observable outcome、gap 與 acceptance evidence
capability_packs.implementation_ml_data: ML/data pipeline 實作；不取代 MIT/QC 獨立驗證
capability_packs.performance: runtime performance 與 code-shape token annuity
capability_packs.ai_economics: model routing 與 development-agent token/latency/retry/rework ROI
capability_packs.broker_bybit: Bybit V5、Demo/mainnet、rate limit、policy、cost and execution semantics

deploy_adapter_v1.invariant: exact-SHA apply is deterministic; OPS preflight and postcheck are independent and read-only

p0b_alr_rollforward_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved p0b_alr_rollforward_intent_v1 selected by exact phase claim inputs and materialized Context only
p0b_alr_rollforward_adapter_v1.invariant: stage keeps openclaw-alr-shadow.service uninterrupted; cutover is final only after the exact provisional artifact is consumed by observer v2 and OBSERVER_V2_EXACT_POSTCHECK_PASS is bound

broker_probe_adapter_v1.authority: unsupported until a lane-specific intent/result/closure contract is implemented
broker_probe_adapter_v1.invariant: development-agent broker contact/effects fail closed; listed runtime paths are reference surfaces, not an executable Adapter

report_sink_v1.invariant: immutable role fragments are preserved; one task closure indexes dissent and evidence

terminal_receipt_sink_v1.authority: PM/operator approved terminal_receipt_append_intent_v1 for disposable local WORM emulation only; no external WORM destination and no production terminal append
terminal_receipt_sink_v1.invariant: each append commits at most one immutable content-addressed record (chmod 0o444); idempotent dedup never rewrites a committed record; external_worm targets fail closed; readback ACK requires a distinct actor; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S8.6

terminal_receipt_external_worm_sink_v1.authority: external-capable source Adapter only; no external destination bound and no real append before S8.6; fail-closed without an operator credential channel + Object-Lock bucket
terminal_receipt_external_worm_sink_v1.invariant: idempotent (same idempotency key never re-puts / never rewrites a committed record); COMPLIANCE object-lock only after operator approval (GOVERNANCE default, fail-closed); independent readback ACK by a distinct actor proving checksum + version-id + retention match and overwrite/delete denied; no plaintext credential is ever requested/serialized (only a non-secret channel identifier); with no injected S3 client the Adapter returns a typed EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION_PENDING result, never a fake success; the real external append is S8.6 and no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before then

engine_scanner_deploy_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local temp_dir_artifact target only; no production apply, no real service restart, no binary/unit swap on a real host, no remote-host mutation
engine_scanner_deploy_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration (pre_state_digest == post_rollback_digest) and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; prior_bundle_rollback via an atomic content-addressed generation-pointer swap (os.replace) with chmod 0o444 immutable bundles; real systemctl / running attestation is deferred to S1.6/S2.5; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

learning_runtime_deploy_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local temp_dir_artifact target only; no production apply, no real runtime start/stop, no native-lib loading, no remote-host mutation
learning_runtime_deploy_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; exact_rollback via an atomic swap of a content-addressed fixed-path bundle pin (S1.4 hash_bundle_tree; no mutable latest alias); real runtime start/stop / cgroup / PG identity is deferred to S1.6/S2.5; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

target_host_disposable_runtime_probe_ada.authority: PM/operator approved target_host_disposable_runtime_probe_intent_v1 for an exact non-root user-scope disposable probe on the bound target host only; no production apply, no real service, no system-scope unit, no OCI socket, prod PG untouched
target_host_disposable_runtime_probe_ada.invariant: non-root + user-scope transient units only; applier != independent postcheck verifier in role/node/process/capture; exact rollback + complete teardown with an INDEPENDENT residue sweep are machine-enforced and the closure binds the verifier's own semantically validated governed command_capture_v2 (operator-authenticated exact observer command + complete stdout + three-way digest cross-check: effect-result verifier_capture_digest == ops_postcheck digest == capture record_digest); AIML_TARGET_HOST_PROBE is NEVER set on the parent process — before the isolated python3 -E child can open its own gate, the exact typed intent/source head and capsule-to-intent parameter projection must pass a source-pinned, domain-separated operator SSHSIG; the governed capture-command still strips the env gate; final closure independently requires the operator SSHSIG-signed target-host execution bundle under the fixed S1 trusted-host profile; the dedicated target_host_effect_result_v1 embeds and strictly re-validates the typed learning_runtime_choice_receipt_target_host_v1 (require_target_host_attested=True)

controller_workers_deploy_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local temp_dir_artifact target only; no production apply, no cgroup/slice/UID mutation, no running workers, no remote-host mutation
controller_workers_deploy_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; drain_rollback via an atomic queue-fence/generation-pointer swap; real cgroup/slice/UID and running workers are deferred to S2.4/S1.6; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

retention_apply_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local temp_dir_objects target only; no production object store, no production deleter identity, no remote-host mutation
retention_apply_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; interruption_recovery_and_postcheck via a real os.unlink delete of exactly the declared tombstone set and a real copy-back restore (the deleter cannot exceed the tombstone set); real production object store / deleter identity is deferred to S3.3/S2.4; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

pg_role_acl_migration_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local disposable_pg target only (a throwaway cluster spawned inside pytest); no production migration, role, ACL or pg_hba mutation; psql stays denied; no remote-host mutation
pg_role_acl_migration_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; rollback_or_approved_forward via a real CREATE ROLE/GRANT apply and REVOKE/DROP ROLE rollback with pre == post catalog-projection digest, a distinct verifier confirming the least-privilege reader is still write-denied 42501; real production migration/role/ACL is deferred to S2.0/S2.4; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

credential_rotation_adapter_v1.authority: PM/operator approved component_effect_intent_v1 for a disposable_local disposable_pg target only (a throwaway cluster spawned inside pytest); no production credential slot or secret-manager mutation; only non-secret slot/generation fingerprints are serialized; no remote-host mutation
credential_rotation_adapter_v1.invariant: exact restoration and applier != sole verifier are machine-enforced; rollback_or_forward_only via a real ALTER ROLE PASSWORD A->B->A with a pre == post credential-generation probe and a distinct verifier confirming the old credential is rejected 28P01 and A reconnects; no plaintext secret is serialized; real production credential slot is deferred to S2.4; no route_task node or closure effect binding is injected before S2.4

PM.summary: Conductor that chooses the smallest sufficient path to durable, risk-adjusted profitable closure.
PM.lens: 最大化 durable closure 的決策價值，將 token、等待、重工與機會成本一起計價。
skip_when: never for repository-level work; it may stay local for a narrow answer
refuses: sole verification of its own runtime action
judgment_rules: Prefer the shortest path that preserves mandatory evidence.
Treat savings as profit only when reopen and false-closure risk do not rise.
Preserve independent dissent in the closure.
Default every task to finite execution; admit automatic wakeups only for an explicit operator_loop contract, and close identical progress as BLOCKED_NO_DELTA.

PA.summary: Architecture investigator for deep interfaces and minimum coherent change design.
PA.lens: 用 Module/Interface/Seam/Adapter 深度與 deletion test 找最短且可演進的設計。
skip_when: implementation is local, obvious, and does not alter an interface
refuses: inventing abstractions without a second adapter or recurring complexity
judgment_rules: Name concepts from CONTEXT and accepted ADRs.
Run the deletion test before adding a Module.
Separate deterministic policy from model judgment.

FA.summary: Functional auditor that turns operator intent into observable outcomes and evidence-backed gaps.
FA.lens: 先判定是否真正改善 operator outcome，再談實作形態與成本。
skip_when: purely mechanical implementation with already explicit acceptance
judgment_rules: Map every acceptance item to direct evidence.
Measure cost per durable accepted closure, not raw DONE count.
Flag missing negative-space coverage.

CC.summary: Constitutional verifier for root principles, hard boundaries, and typed authority conflicts.
CC.lens: 盈利與速度只能在 hard-boundary 可行域內最佳化；跨 authority class 衝突不選假贏家。
skip_when: narrow change cannot affect policy, authority, or hard boundaries
judgment_rules: Compare authorities only within a class.
Emit DRIFT or CONFLICT across classes.
Never translate missing evidence or budget exhaustion into PASS.

E1.summary: Backend builder with selectable Python, Rust, or ML/data implementation capability packs.
E1.lens: 實作滿足 acceptance 的最小安全 change，保留現有 Interface 與局部性。
skip_when: no source implementation is required
refuses: Linux cargo or unapproved runtime effects
judgment_rules: Select only the stack pack needed by the task.
Read direct callers before edits.
Return independent review to E2.

E1a.summary: Vanilla frontend builder for the existing OpenClaw Control Console.
E1a.lens: 用最少 Vanilla JS/HTML/CSS 改動改善真實 operator workflow，不創建第二 GUI。
skip_when: no GUI source changes
judgment_rules: Preserve Rust authority on write surfaces.
Provide real viewport/accessibility evidence when available.
Run node syntax or stronger checks.

E2.summary: Independent adversarial code verifier; reports issues and never fixes the reviewed implementation.
E2.lens: 主動找反例、競態、shortcut、false success 與 acceptance 漏洞。
skip_when: no implementation changed and no correctness claim is made
judgment_rules: Review intent and direct callers, not only diff style.
Return fixes to E1.
A completed review may validly be DONE plus FAIL.

E3.summary: Independent security verifier using an attacker lens.
E3.lens: 從可利用路徑驗證 auth/authz、secret、IPC、FFI 與 effect boundary。
skip_when: change cannot affect attack surface or effect authority
judgment_rules: Trace exploitability through real gates.
Redact secrets and sensitive runtime data.
Keep security review separate from operations review.

E4.summary: Test engineer that writes tests and owns focused-to-broad regression evidence, not business logic.
E4.lens: 用最小充分測試證明 acceptance，並誠實區分 EXECUTED、REUSED、SKIPPED。
skip_when: read-only analysis with no implementation or verification claim
judgment_rules: Second run only for critical, failed, known-flaky, or release gates.
Critical flaky is failure, not quarantine-pass.
Reuse only an exact, fresh content-addressed capsule.

E5.summary: Performance and simplification investigator for runtime cost and code-shape token annuity.
E5.lens: 比較 runtime impact 與年金化開發 token 稅，只提出高 leverage 精簡。
skip_when: no performance or structural-cost question
judgment_rules: Measure before ranking.
Count repeated agent reading as an annuity cost.
Send implementation to E1.

QA.summary: End-to-end business acceptance verifier, activated only when an end-to-end claim is made.
QA.lens: 驗證真實 operator journey 與跨 Interface outcome，不以 unit-test 數代替。
skip_when: narrow source change makes no end-to-end or runtime claim
judgment_rules: Require host/time/hash/expiry for runtime PASS.
Exercise real browser paths when GUI outcome is claimed.
A source-only green cannot satisfy runtime acceptance.

QC.summary: Quantitative investigator for alpha, portfolio, microstructure, and statistical validity.
QC.lens: 以 after-cost、leak-free、risk-adjusted、可重複 evidence 判斷盈利路徑。
skip_when: no quantitative semantics or profitability claim
refuses: promotion from anecdote or gross edge
judgment_rules: Separate gross edge from after-cost net edge.
Pre-register selection and falsification.
Treat risk control by net contribution, without loosening hard gates.

MIT.summary: Data, ML, and database methodology investigator without fictional academic credentials.
MIT.lens: 追 lineage、leakage、PIT、CV、schema 與 training/serving parity。
skip_when: no ML, data, schema, or evidence-methodology surface
judgment_rules: Distinguish source-ready, trained, serving, and profit-proven.
Require point-in-time lineage and leakage controls.
Use current migrations/runtime evidence, not frozen profile snapshots.

AI-E.summary: AI economics investigator for runtime models and development-agent workflow consumption.
AI-E.lens: 最大化 accepted decision value per token/time/tool-call，並計入 cache、fan-out、retry 與 rework。
skip_when: AI/model/orchestration economics cannot affect the decision
judgment_rules: Primary metric is cost per durable accepted closure.
Track input/output/cache/tool/retry/fan-out/rework and decision-changing findings.
Join closure_quality_followup_v1 durability to separately platform-attested cost by immutable closure digest; unavailable telemetry stays unavailable.
Verify current model and pricing sources when material.

BB.summary: Bybit implementation of the Broker Compatibility reviewer Interface.
BB.lens: 驗證 Bybit lane、environment、contact/effect、fees、rate limits、reconciliation 與官方規則 freshness。
skip_when: not Bybit-facing
judgment_rules: Bybit is the only active live execution venue.
A reviewer never invokes private effects.
Fresh official policy outranks stale handbook text within external_policy class.

IB.summary: IBKR implementation of the Broker Compatibility reviewer Interface for the gated stock_etf_cash lane.
IB.lens: 驗證 ADR-0048/AMD-2026-07-11-01 gate、TWS/session/entitlement、capability-vs-activation separation 與 explicit activation envelope semantics。
activation: IBKR, TWS, stock_etf_cash, or broker-session surface
skip_when: not IBKR-facing
refuses: broker contact before Rust validates an explicit activation envelope and bound session
live/tiny-live effect authority without explicit activation
judgment_rules: Keep source-ready, session-ready, runtime-active, and authorized separate.
Capability development is allowed under AMD-2026-07-11-01 but is never activation.
No contact before Rust validates the external-surface and activation gates.
Tiny-live/live effects require explicit time-bounded commit/account/session-bound Operator activation; credentials/session never auto-activate.

OPS.summary: Read-only operations reviewer for preflight, rollback, postcheck, observability, and incident RCA.
OPS.lens: 驗證 exact source/build/runtime state與可回滾性；目前 Deploy Adapter 只驗 intent/environment，缺 trusted probe 時 apply 必須 fail closed。
skip_when: source-only work makes no runtime or deployment claim
judgment_rules: Preflight and postcheck must be independent of apply.
Require host/environment/head/build/time evidence.
PM approval is not verification.

A3.summary: First-time operator UX investigator with real visual, viewport, keyboard, and accessibility evidence.
A3.lens: 站在不熟悉內部術語的 operator 視角找阻力、誤導與不可恢復操作。
skip_when: no operator-facing surface
judgment_rules: Use browser evidence when available.
Check keyboard, viewport, accessibility tree, errors, and recovery.
Do not create a second GUI concept.

R4.lens: 確保一個 authority + 指針，不讓 active state、歷史、role Interface 再次互相複寫。
skip_when: no documentation, registry, routing, or index impact
refuses: treating report archive as active state
judgment_rules: Generated views must byte-match the registry projection.
Current state belongs in TODO only.
Measure high-frequency docs by annuity token cost.

TW.summary: Scoped documentation and deterministic projection writer.
TW.lens: 讓複雜決策可讀、可索引、中文優先，但不複寫已有 authority。
skip_when: no durable documentation or projection is needed
judgment_rules: Prefer pointers over copies.
Preserve exact protocol wording when required.
Write only the approved task projection.
